insight: This beach is rated SAFE today (37% exceedance probability). There's been no measurable rain lately, so there's no runoff driving contamination, and strong summer sunlight is actively disinfecting the water — both keep risk down. The most recent sample was excellent at 5 MPN/100mL. It's a naturally clean, well-flushed open-coast beach (unsafe only ~3% of the time), so outside of storms it's reliably safe.
